title: Proportion
claim: A proportion states that two ratios are equal within a defined context.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: If two ratios preserve the same relative quantity structure, they are proportional.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: If two ratios preserve the same relative quantity structure, they are proportional.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
